sentence: 这项工程具有长期性，需要持续投入。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng gōng chéng jù yǒu cháng qī xìng, xū yào chí xù tóu rù.
english: This project is long-term in nature and requires sustained investment.

sentence: 她头天晚上就把行李都收拾好了。
pinyin: Tā tóu tiān wǎn shàng jiù bǎ xíng li dōu shōu shí hǎo le.
english: She had all her luggage packed the evening before.

meaning: water valve; sluice gate; (aviation) water salute
sentence: 工人把水门关上，防止河水倒灌。
pinyin: Gōng rén bǎ shuǐ mén guān shàng, fáng zhǐ hé shuǐ dào guàn.
english: The workers closed the sluice gate to prevent river water from flowing back.

sentence: 生物课上他们解剖了一只青蛙。
pinyin: Shēngwù kè shàng tāmen jiěpōu le yī zhī qīngwā.
english: In biology class they dissected a frog.

sentence: 医生把X光片子拿给我看。
pinyin: Yīshēng bǎ X guāng piānzi ná gěi wǒ kàn.
english: The doctor showed me the X-ray image.

meaning: amount; sum of money; fixed number
sentence: 捐款数额由你自己决定。
pinyin: Juānkuǎn shù'é yóu nǐ zìjǐ juédìng.
english: The donation amount is up to you to decide.

meaning: thwart; to obstruct (something); stand in the way
sentence: 任何人都不得阻挠正常的工作进程。
pinyin: Rènhé rén dōu bùdé zǔnáo zhèngcháng de gōngzuò jìnchéng.
english: No one is allowed to obstruct the normal work process.

sentence: 听到消息后，他顿时愣住了。
pinyin: Tīng dào xiāoxi hòu, tā dùnshí lèng zhù le.
english: After hearing the news, he was suddenly stunned.

meaning: fig. lighthearted person; Daoist immortal; supernatural entity; (in mo
sentence: 他俩感情好得像神仙眷侣一样。
pinyin: Tā liǎ gǎnqíng hǎo de xiàng shénxiān juànlǚ yīyàng.
english: The two of them are so in love they seem like a fairy-tale couple.

sentence: 三小于五，这是基本数学知识。
pinyin: Sān xiǎoyú wǔ, zhè shì jīběn shùxué zhīshì.
english: Three is less than five—this is basic math.

sentence: 他的病发现得晚，已是晚期了。
pinyin: Tā de bìng fāxiàn de wǎn, yǐ shì wǎnqī le.
english: His illness was detected late and is already at an advanced stage.

sentence: 去北京一定要参观故宫，那是古代的皇宫。
pinyin: Qù Běijīng yīdìng yào cānguān Gùgōng, nà shì gǔdài de huánggōng.
english: When visiting Beijing, you must see the Forbidden City — it was the imperial palace in ancient times.

sentence: 课本里讲到了帝国主义对殖民地的影响。
pinyin: Kèběn lǐ jiǎngdàole dìguó zhǔyì duì zhímíndì de yǐngxiǎng.
english: The textbook discussed the impact of imperialism on colonies.

meaning: 1. slight; 2. light; 3. trivial; 4. to a small extent
sentence: 他只是轻微扭伤，休息几天就好了。
pinyin: Tā zhǐ shì qīng wēi niǔ shāng, xiū xi jǐ tiān jiù hǎo le.
english: He only has a slight sprain; he'll be fine after a few days of rest.

sentence: 这部电影上映后反响很好。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng shàngyìng hòu fǎnxiǎng hěn hǎo.
english: The film received a very positive reaction after its release.

sentence: 他对邻居一直很友善。
pinyin: Tā duì línjū yīzhí hěn yǒushàn.
english: He has always been very friendly to his neighbors.

sentence: 请拨打客服热线反映问题。
pinyin: Qǐng bōdǎ kèfú rèxiàn fǎnyìng wèntí.
english: Please call the customer service hotline to report your issue.

sentence: 新体育馆预计明年底竣工。
pinyin: Xīn tǐyùguǎn yùjì míngnián dǐ jùngōng.
english: The new gymnasium is expected to be completed by the end of next year.

sentence: 他们一家去北方滑雪度假。
pinyin: Tāmen yī jiā qù běifāng huáxuě dùjià.
english: The whole family went skiing in the north for vacation.

sentence: 床的上方挂着一盏灯。
pinyin: Chuáng de shàng fāng guà zhe yī zhǎn dēng.
english: A lamp is hanging above the bed.

sentence: 他是这家公司的创始人之一。
pinyin: Tā shì zhè jiā gōngsī de chuàngshǐ rén zhī yī.
english: He is one of the founders of this company.

sentence: 教练让他在下半场上场。
pinyin: Jiàoliàn ràng tā zài xià bàncháng shàngchǎng.
english: The coach had him take the field in the second half.

sentence: 气温趋向于逐渐升高。
pinyin: Qìwēn qūxiàng yú zhújiàn shēnggāo.
english: Temperatures are trending gradually upward.

meaning: 1. to comment; 2. a point by point commentary
sentence: 老师对每篇作文都进行了点评。
pinyin: Lǎoshī duì měi piān zuòwén dōu jìnxíng le diǎnpíng.
english: The teacher gave commentary on every essay.

meaning: 1. function; 2. capability; 3. sense (i.e. the five senses of sight 視|
sentence: 香水通过刺激嗅觉官能吸引人。
pinyin: Xiāngshuǐ tōngguò cìjī xiùjué guānnéng xīyǐn rén.
english: Perfume attracts people by stimulating the sense of smell.

sentence: 请先对项目做一个概述。
pinyin: Qǐng xiān duì xiàngmù zuò yī gè gàishù.
english: Please first give an overview of the project.

meaning: memorandum; aide-memoire; diplomacy memorandum; memorandum book
sentence: 我在手机上写了一份备忘录。
pinyin: Wǒ zài shǒujī shàng xiě le yī fèn bèiwànglù.
english: I wrote a memo on my phone.

meaning: lever; pry bar; crowbar; financial leverage
sentence: 用杠杆可以轻松撬开盖子。
pinyin: Yòng gànggǎn kěyǐ qīngsōng qiàokāi gàizi.
english: You can easily pry off the lid using a lever.

sentence: 你需要激活账号才能登录。
pinyin: Nǐ xūyào jīhuó zhànghào cái néng dēnglù.
english: You need to activate your account before you can log in.

sentence: 她买了一件粉红色的外套。
pinyin: Tā mǎi le yī jiàn fěnhóngsè de wàitào.
english: She bought a pink jacket.

meaning: 1. single; 2. alone; 3. individually; 4. an odd one
sentence: 这些苹果也可以单个出售。
pinyin: Zhèxiē píngguǒ yě kěyǐ dāngè chūshòu.
english: These apples can also be sold individually.

sentence: 这个零件是用铝合金做的。
pinyin: Zhège língjiàn shì yòng lǚ héjīn zuò de.
english: This part is made of aluminum alloy.

meaning: 1. to bring one's own; 2. BYO; 3. (of software) preinstalled
sentence: 这款手机自带翻译软件。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī zì dài fānyì ruǎnjiàn.
english: This phone comes with a translation app preinstalled.

sentence: 他为电脑添置了几件外设。
pinyin: Tā wèi diànnǎo tiānzhì le jǐ jiàn wàishè.
english: He added several peripherals to his computer.

sentence: 这本书共有二十个章节。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū gòng yǒu èrshí gè zhāngjié.
english: This book has a total of twenty chapters.

sentence: 机组人员在起飞前做好了检查。
pinyin: Jīzǔ rényuán zài qǐfēi qián zuòhǎo le jiǎnchá.
english: The flight crew completed their checks before takeoff.

sentence: 警方正在联系被害人的家属。
pinyin: Jǐngfāng zhèngzài liánxì bèihàirén de jiāshǔ.
english: Police are contacting the victim's family.

sentence: 议会通过了这项修正案。
pinyin: Yìhuì tōngguò le zhè xiàng xiūzhèng'àn.
english: The parliament passed this amendment.

meaning: 1. to repeal (a law); 2. to put an end to; 3. abolition; 4. annulled
sentence: 旧规定已经被正式废止了。
pinyin: Jiù guīdìng yǐjīng bèi zhèngshì fèizhǐ le.
english: The old regulation has been formally repealed.

sentence: 水是一种常见的化合物。
pinyin: Shuǐ shì yī zhǒng chángjiàn de huàhéwù.
english: Water is a common chemical compound.

meaning: to block (a user), protective screen, screen
sentence: 他把那个账号屏蔽了。
pinyin: Tā bǎ nàge zhànghào píngbì le.
english: He blocked that account.

meaning: main points of a case; brief; summary
sentence: 法官宣读了这起案件的案由。
pinyin: Fǎ guān xuān dú le zhè qǐ àn jiàn de àn yóu.
english: The judge read out the summary of this case.

meaning: to advance on sth; to press closely (on some goal)
sentence: 对方球队不断进逼，我方守门员压力很大。
pinyin: Duì fāng qiú duì bù duàn jìn bī, wǒ fāng shǒu mén yuán yā lì hěn dà.
english: The opposing team kept pressing forward, putting a lot of pressure on our goalkeeper.

meaning: where in the order of seniority among siblings?; (sometimes used in rh
sentence: 你在家里排行老几？
pinyin: Nǐ zài jiā lǐ páiháng lǎo jǐ?
english: Where do you rank among your siblings?

sentence: 大会报告员宣布了最终结果。
pinyin: Dàhuì bàogàoyuán xuānbùle zuìzhōng jiéguǒ.
english: The conference announcer declared the final results.

meaning: writer of 詞|词[ci2] (a kind of Classical Chinese poem); person of liter
sentence: 苏轼是宋代著名的词人。
pinyin: Sū Shì shì Sòngdài zhùmíng de círén.
english: Su Shi was a famous ci poet of the Song dynasty.

sentence: 他离开本乡二十年了。
pinyin: Tā líkāi běn xiāng èrshí nián le.
english: He has been away from his home village for twenty years.

meaning: to bring to justice; to punish according to the law
sentence: 造假的商家必须依法法办。
pinyin: Zào jiǎ de shāngjiā bìxū yīfǎ fǎbàn.
english: Merchants who sell counterfeit goods must be brought to justice.

meaning: to put on theatrical makeup; (neologism c. 2014) to debunk sb's claim;
sentence: 他刚说不会输，结果第一局就输了，真打脸。
pinyin: Tā gāng shuō bù huì shū, jiéguǒ dì yī jú jiù shū le, zhēn dǎliǎn.
english: He just said he wouldn't lose, then lost the very first round — talk about putting egg on his face.

sentence: 洪灾期间军民团结一致抗洪。
pinyin: Hóng zāi qījiān jūn mín tuánjié yīzhì kàng hóng.
english: During the flood, soldiers and civilians united to fight the disaster.
